title: Preflight Gemini maintenance scan capability
goal: Produce a reviewed capability and sandbox preflight for any Gemini-based Cabinet maintenance scan before scheduling or recurring execution is allowed.

acceptance.assertion: The preflight records the exact Gemini tool/action, version or pin, authentication mode and secret boundary without exposing secrets.
The preflight proves read-only operation with no issue, PR, contents-write, dispatch, merge, runtime or queue mutation permission, or blocks the lane with a specific reason.
The preflight checks whether Gemini can emit bounded Markdown plus JSON output suitable for later validation.
Cost/quota class and log privacy risks are recorded before any scheduled lane is considered.

metadata.block_reason: Cabinet preflight found no concrete Gemini tool/action, version or pin, authentication model, permission manifest, cost/quota class or log privacy boundary. Gemini maintenance scans remain not schedulable.
metadata.next_action: Define a concrete Gemini execution manifest before any dry run or schedule decision.
